title: duranta repens var. alba
intro: Duranta repens var. alba, also known as Blue Sky Flower or Golden Dewdrop, is a flowering plant native to the Caribbean and Central America, characterized by its white, funnel-shaped flowers and golden-yellow berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Duranta repens var. alba include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an antibacterial agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
